title: Chapter 351
content:
Chapter 351: Chapter 351 : The Villainess Who Froze at the Finish Line

Jax honestly had zero choices left seeing exactly how terrifyingly Astrid was behaving right now. He instantly activated his domain skill, a technique originally designed as an overpowered one-on-one battle cheat that was supposed to give him the ultimate combat advantage.

But tonight this legendary space was basically being hijacked as some twisted punishment room. A highly dangerous private arena where only Astrid knew the actual rules.

The exact moment the beautiful night sky and all the glowing stars completely vanished, both of them found themselves standing on their feet inside a massive glowing violet space that stretched endlessly in every direction.

Astrid did not waste a single millisecond. While still physically glued to his body, she immediately brought her knee up and delivered an absolutely merciless kick straight into his lowest hanging fruit.

[Critical Hit! HP -200]

Jax instantly dropped to his knees in unimaginable agony while desperately clutching his thoroughly cooked omelettes. He squeezed his eyes shut and managed to force out a few painfully squeaky words. "At least think about our future first before you violently crush the very foundation of it."

Astrid refused to drop her sickeningly sweet innocent act. She playfully tapped her cheek while pretending to deeply analyze his broken words. "Future? That is exactly why I aimed directly for the foundation. Who honestly knows how many more random girls you might accidentally impregnate with that highly dangerous lustful weapon of yours."

She shrugged with total conviction. "I simply cannot allow that catastrophic future to happen. So I permanently revoked your firing rights."

She stared down at the utterly miserable and crying face of Jax crumpled on the floor and gasped in exaggerated surprise. "Oopsie daisy. I might have gone just a tiny bit too hard for the very first step. I will totally remember your pathetic durability for the next several torture phases."

Jax forced out a trembling whisper through his agony. "Please snap out of this. I fully admit I am the one completely in the wrong here. But you really need to realize that permanently destroying this equipment means you will never ever get to use it either."

Her expression melted into a terribly tragic sigh as she placed the back of her hand against her forehead. "Oh, is that how it is? Do you not think that is incredibly unfair to me? I will be the only sad girl left totally in the dark while those three greedy bitches already squeezed every single drop out of you."

She suddenly spun around with a dramatic victim pose before her face turned completely feral. "Do not feel too sad about it, professor, because I will be forcefully snatching my delayed share and completely overtaking all of them right here and right now."

Jax instantly realized exactly where this twisted logic was heading. "Please do not tell me, Astrid, that you are actually..."

Astrid tilted her head with a dangerously sweet giggle. "Bingo. You guessed it perfectly. And as for your grand prize..."

A heavy silence dropped over the violet room. Her playful innocence completely evaporated and instantly morphed into the crushing aura of a ruthless corporate dictator who had decided that mercy was simply not on tonight’s agenda. Her glowing eyes turned entirely freezing.

"Take off your clothes right now. And strip for me."

Jax violently scrambled backward across the floor in sheer terror. "Astrid, that is completely against the basic rules of romance! Forcefully rushing this will only ruin the entire experience for you. A real romantic connection should never involve forced intimacy, and definitely not for our very first major one together!"

He slowly looked down at his deeply traumatized crotch beneath his pants and fully expected the battered thing to start leaking actual blood. "Besides, I genuinely do not feel like I can even do it right now."

Astrid raised her hand and started casually playing with her mana. "Who exactly gave you the right to decide if you can or cannot? Your opinions do not matter to me and your say in this matter will not change a single thing."

Her voice hardened. "And as for me being too forceful, you are the exact one who backed me into a corner and left me with no other choice."

A blade of purple mana formed in one hand while the other began weaving a glowing mana thread that hummed with intent.

She slowly stalked around him like a ruthless predator examining a completely helpless prey. The glowing thread shot forward and forcefully bound his hands high above his head. Once he was securely trapped, she slid the cold flat side of her glowing blade right under his collar.

One swift and elegant flick of her wrist drove the magical edge downward and violently popped every single button off his shirt in a clean line.

’Why am I feeling this incredibly weak inside my own domain?’ Jax desperately screamed inside his head. ’This was supposed to be my ultimate advantage. Why the hell has she become so overwhelmingly strong and scary tonight? Did my stupid skill actually glitch this time?’

Jax panicked as Astrid silently analyzed his exposed chest and his completely pathetic restrained form. "Wait, you absolutely cannot just rape me inside my own private space! That is strictly against the law and you will face severe consequences if I..."

She forcefully cut him off by painfully pinching his bare nipple with zero remorse. "The law? Oh, professor, you clearly do not know it yet. But I have done far more terrible things than this, and that very law clearly states that everything is perfectly fine as long as it is done by me. Therefore, I completely own the entire law as well as this exact space."

And to seal her declaration, she sank her teeth directly into his exposed neck. Hard enough to drop another chunk of his HP without a shred of guilt.

When she finally separated, she left behind a vivid red mark glistening with her saliva like a freshly branded seal of ownership.

Her satisfied gaze drifted lazily downward. From his naked chest, tracing slowly all the way south until it finally arrived at the one sight that completely and utterly shattered her entire grand villain act.

His cock was rock hard. Straining aggressively against the fabric of his pants with the kind of determination that left absolutely nothing to the imagination.

Astrid’s face instantly crumbled.

And that was the exact moment Jax read her like a book he had already memorized. He knew this was Astrid’s first time. And no matter how angry or dominant she forced herself to become, she was still the exact same innocent goofball hiding underneath all that chaos.

Her grand villain performance had gone flawlessly until she slammed face first into a complete mental deadlock. Because she was far too hesitant to actually go any further.

Jax entirely processed her sudden frozen state and desperately wanted to tease the adorable idiot. But his roaring survival instincts were physically demanding him to keep his mouth permanently shut.

’Do not say it. She will end you. Just stay quiet. Keep your mouth shut, Jax. For the love of every god in this broken world, keep it shut.’

But at the very end, those desperately screaming instincts were completely obliterated by the his absolutely irresistible urge.

Jax looked up at the frozen villainess towering above him and slowly let a completely mocking grin spread across his battered, bitten, scratched, and thoroughly destroyed face before saying....

-x-X-x-
